## Contributor checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I kept this PR focused on one change.
- [ ] I did not edit generated `*.g.dart` files manually.
- [ ] I did not add telemetry, hidden network calls, secrets, or signing keys.
